narrative:
Hanover Village (precinct in Licking County) has 965 registered voters, with 55.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
